title: Program Leader
subtitle: Software Engineering & MIS
bullets: Coordinated and executed academic, technological, and community-focused events, including workshops, talks, and extracurricular activities.
Provided direct academic guidance and mentorship to students, supporting their learning paths and professional development.
Promoted collaborative work, student leadership, and active participation within the university community.
Represented the Software Engineering & MIS program in internal initiatives and institutional events.

title: Peer Tutor
subtitle: Academic Support
bullets: Supported fellow students through peer-to-peer education, assisting with coursework, problem-solving, and exam preparation.
Adapted explanations to different learning styles to improve understanding of technical and academic concepts.
Encouraged independent learning and confidence in academic performance.

title: Technical Support Agent
subtitle: Microsoft Entra ID & Outlook
bullets: Provided technical support for Microsoft Entra ID, managing user access, identity synchronization, and domain-related issues.
Configured and troubleshot Active Directory and DNS environments affecting authentication services.
Resolved Outlook email connectivity issues involving IMAP, SMTP, and POP3 protocols.

title: Academic Dean's Assistant
subtitle: Administration
bullets: Assisted the Academic Dean with administrative and academic coordination tasks.
Prepared reports, documentation, and summaries to support decision-making processes.
Supported communication between academic departments and administrative offices.

title: Customer Service & BI Support
subtitle: Data & Support
bullets: Delivered customer-facing technical and service support in presencial environments.
Worked with data tools such as Microsoft Power BI and PHP to support reporting and operational needs.
Developed strong problem-solving and communication skills in high-demand service contexts.
